overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 136 条，入选 7 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 136 previously displayed items excluded, and 7 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
items.summary_zh: 重点：Google DeepMind相关访谈/播客更新，核心议题是“Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership”，可用于跟踪 AI 高管判断、产业方向和产品趋势。
items.summary_en: Focus: Google DeepMind is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

items.title: Sakana AI 伊藤錬、国連「AI for Good」グローバル委員会創設委員に就任
items.summary_zh: 重点：Sakana AI出现新动态，主题为“Sakana AI 伊藤錬、国連「AI for Good」グローバル委員会創設委員に就任”，与 AI 产品、产业落地或技术路线变化有关。
items.summary_en: Focus: Sakana AI has a new AI-related update around 'Sakana AI 伊藤錬、国連「AI for Good」グローバル委員会創設委員に就任', relevant to product, industry or technical direction.

items.title: AIEWF Daily Dispatch: The great loops debate and the state of AI engineering
items.summary_zh: 重点：The AI Engineer World’s Fair ended with a debate about loops, a report on the state of AI engineering, and closing keynotes focused on what to build next.
items.summary_en: Focus: The AI Engineer World’s Fair ended with a debate about loops, a report on the state of AI engineering, and closing keynotes focused on what to build next.

items.title: Vercel's Andrew Qu on why agents are a new kind of software
items.summary_zh: 重点：The Vercel Chief of Software explains how its agent framework, eve, was created — and why skills, sandboxes and agent-readable websites now matter.
items.summary_en: Focus: The Vercel Chief of Software explains how its agent framework, eve, was created — and why skills, sandboxes and agent-readable websites now matter.

items.title: Vercel Sandbox now supports FUSE-based filesystems
items.summary_zh: 重点：Vercel Sandbox now supports FUSE, letting you mount remote storage and custom filesystems inside a running Sandbox. Use it to attach S3 buckets, network filesystems, or any other FUSE-compatible driver as a regular path. This makes it possible to stream lar
items.summary_en: Focus: Vercel Sandbox now supports FUSE, letting you mount remote storage and custom filesystems inside a running Sandbox. items.title: Manage Vercel Flags segments with Vercel CLI
items.summary_zh: 重点：Vercel Flags segments can now be managed from the Vercel CLI with the new vercel flags segments command. A segment is the targeting primitive a flag uses to decide who sees what. Membership composes from three repeatable tokens: include: , exclude: , and ru
items.summary_en: Focus: Vercel Flags segments can now be managed from the Vercel CLI with the new vercel flags segments command.
